name: @storyos/root
description: StoryMaker is a local-first narrative engineering runtime for long-context, AI-assisted story production.

scripts.build:dashboard: corepack pnpm --filter @storyos/core build && corepack pnpm --filter @storyos/schemas build && corepack pnpm --filter @storyos/workflow-engine build && corepack pnpm --filter @storyos/knowledge build && corepack pnpm --filter @storyos/indexer build && corepack pnpm --filter @storyos/adapters-codex build && corepack pnpm --filter @storyos/adapters-claude build && corepack pnpm --filter @storyos/exporters build && corepack pnpm --filter @storyos/prompts build && corepack pnpm --filter @storyos/quality-gates build && corepack pnpm --filter @storyos/cli build && corepack pnpm --filter ./apps/dashboard build
